texto: My heart is hardy, for I have suffered much on the seas and the battlefield: this will be only something more. But a ravenous belly cannot be hid, damn the thing. It gives a world of trouble to men, makes them fit out fleets of ships and scour the barren sea, to bring misery on their enemies.
explicacao: Citação de W.H.D. Rouse sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “My heart is hardy, for I have suffered much on the seas and the battlefield: this will be only so…” articula amor, appetite, flesh em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como flesh e greed.
